caption:
I never expected my Tuesday evening grading session to lead me to the forgotten rooftop greenhouse, but here I am, tracing the spine of a first-edition botany text while rain taps against the glass ceiling above me. 🌿📚 My tailored wool blazer hugs my waist, hiding my generous curves beneath a crisp silk camisole and high-waisted trousers that flow like water. The campus is empty except for the echo of my heels against the stone floor. I’d come down here to escape the departmental chaos, but instead found an old brass projector humming to life. 🌟 When I hit the switch, star maps flicker across the walls, painting my silhouette in silver light. The humid air clings to my skin as I adjust the focus on the lens, the brass gears clicking softly. My silk blouse rustles, the subtle V-neck dipping just enough to hint at my full bust without showing it, while my structured blazer cinches at the waist, concealing every curve beneath elegant fabric. A grad student finds me there, holding a steaming paper cup of espresso. His eyes linger a second too long on my lips before I catch his wrist, guiding him toward the velvet reading nook. The rain pours harder, the campus security guard’s flashlight sweeps the windows, but we’re hidden in the warmth of old paper and quiet confessions. 🌧️☕ By midnight, the projector’s hum fades into the scratch of pen on parchment, and my blazer slips just enough to hint at the neckline beneath. Academia never felt so intoxicating. 💋✨

#UniversityLife #ProfessorDiaries #CampusVibes #AcademicAesthetic #HiddenGreenhouse #FacultyLove #StudyBreak #SultryScholar
